ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build continues to target JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for the target Java version.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.why_exists: List.get(0) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException on empty lists, whereas List.getFirst() throws NoSuchElementException, providing a more specific and semantically correct error for empty collections in Java 21.

ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better performance and thread-safety.
